subject: Vegeta (Dragon Ball Super) — armored warrior with upswept dark hair crossing arms, expression stern and closed-off
description: A powerfully built male-presenting figure with distinctive upswept dark hair stands arms crossed, expression deeply stern and dismissive. He wears dark battle armor with a visible chest plate. The background is a burst of green and yellow-green energy, giving a sense of barely suppressed power. The composition is a close mid-shot framing the figure from roughly the waist up, facing slightly left of center.
foreground: armored male-presenting figure with arms crossed, stern expression
